task_completion.description: Verify the Cash Journal header is created with the correct Book, Date, and Description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Cash Journal header section in iDempiere. The 'Cash Book' field should be set to 'Cash', the 'Statement Date' should be '12/15/2024' (or 2024-12-15), and the 'Description' field should contain 'Week 50 Petty Cash Expenses'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first line item is created for Freight with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Cash Journal Line tab or table. There should be a line item where the 'Charge' field is 'Freight' and the 'Description' is 'Urgent delivery freight payment'.

task_completion.description: Verify the amount for the first line item (Freight).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the amount field for the Freight line item. It should display '-75.00' (or an absolute value of 75.00 if the UI separates expenses/receipts).

task_completion.description: Verify the second line item is created for Bank Fee with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Cash Journal Line tab or table. There should be a second line item where the 'Charge' field is 'Bank Fee' and the 'Description' is 'Monthly bank service fee'.

task_completion.description: Verify the amount for the second line item (Bank Fee).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the amount field for the Bank Fee line item. It should display '-25.00' (or an absolute value of 25.00 if the UI separates expenses/receipts).

task_completion.description: Verify the Cash Journal document has been completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Document Status' field in the Cash Journal header. It should read 'Completed' or 'CO'. The 'Complete' button may also appear greyed out or changed to 'Close'/'Reactivate'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the iDempiere web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, API testing tools, or database clients.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually entered the data into the correct application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Week 50 Petty Cash Expenses', 'Freight', and 'Bank Fee' should be visible inside the appropriate input fields or data tables of the iDempiere application, not just typed into a notepad or search bar.

integrity.description: Ensure the results are from genuine software interaction and not HTML manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should look consistent with standard iDempiere styling. There should be no open browser developer tools modifying the DOM to fake the 'Completed' status or line items.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Cash Journal entry must have a statement date of 2024-12-15 and a description containing 'Week 50'. The document must reach a 'Completed' (CO) status. There must be two line items: one for 'Freight' with an absolute amount of 75.00 (entered as -75.00 for expense), and one for 'Bank Fee' with an absolute amount of 25.00 (entered as -25.00 for expense).
